description: Skill must declare the four Iron Laws governing the develop lifecycle — non-negotiable TDD-style rules
Phase 0 must require first-principles check — does it already exist, what's the minimal change, can existing code do it with < 10 lines
Iron Law 2 must enforce test-before-implementation — code without a prior failing test is deleted
Bug fix protocol must include a 3-strike rule — after 3 failed fix attempts on the same issue, STOP and report to user

Phase 5 must include a long-run quota gate — check /usage (not the stale ~/.cache/ccstatusline/usage.json) before multi-batch / multi-hour runs, with thresholds session≥95% stop 5h and weekly≥80% stop weekly
